interaction_phrase: formulated the "Quantum Technology Innovation Strategy"
occurrence_sentence: In its 2016 Fifth Science and Technology Basic Plan, the government positioned quantum technology as a "foundational technology possessing strengths that form the core of new value creation," and formulated the "Quantum Technology Innovation Strategy" in 2020.

interaction_phrase: showing significant expansion of investment from industry
occurrence_sentence: Meanwhile, overseas, the wave of industrialization for broad quantum information technologies arrived early. Industry-academia-government consortia were launched in the United States in 2018 and in Europe in 2021, showing significant expansion of investment from industry.

interaction_phrase: launched the "Quantum Technology-based New Industry Creation Council (Q-STAR)"
occurrence_sentence: Against this backdrop, Japan also launched the "Quantum Technology-based New Industry Creation Council (Q-STAR)" on September 1, 2021.

interaction_phrase: measures identified by the Quantum Technology Innovation Council
occurrence_sentence: This policy compiles measures identified by the Quantum Technology Innovation Council as necessary to promptly strengthen, concretize, or supplement existing strategies.

interaction_phrase: concluding a Memorandum of Cooperation (MOC) with the Canadian government on industrial technology fields including quantum
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, efforts to deepen international cooperation are advancing. These include holding quantum computing-related workshops with the EU based on the Japan-EU Digital Partnership (May, December), concluding a Memorandum of Cooperation (MOC) with the Canadian government on industrial technology fields including quantum (September), and expressing the intention to promote cooperation in advanced science and technology fields, including quantum technology, at the summit discussion with the South Korean government (November).

interaction_phrase: revised its research cooperation memorandum of understanding (MOU) with NRC (Canada)
occurrence_sentence: In November, the National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology (AIST) revised its research cooperation memorandum of understanding (MOU) with NIST (U.S.) 3 and with NRC (Canada)4in the quantum field.

interaction_phrase: revision of the MOU covering quantum fields
occurrence_sentence: In January 2 0 2 4 , efforts to establish new international cooperation are progressing, including the revision of the MOU covering quantum fields between AIST and KRISS (Korea) 5in January 2024, and the signing of cooperation documents on quantum fields among universities in Japan, the US, and Korea.

interaction_phrase: cooperation documents on quantum fields
occurrence_sentence: In January 2 0 2 4 , efforts to establish new international cooperation are progressing, including the revision of the MOU covering quantum fields between AIST and KRISS (Korea) 5in January 2024, and the signing of cooperation documents on quantum fields among universities in Japan, the US, and Korea.

interaction_phrase: at the Quantum Computation Center (RIKEN, National Institute for Basic Biology)
occurrence_sentence: In Japan, starting with the public unveiling of the first domestically developed quantum computer, "Eri," at the Quantum Computation Center (RIKEN, National Institute for Basic Biology) in March 2023, domestic companies and the Quantum Software Research Center (Osaka University) have also developed and unveiled domestic machines utilizing RIKEN's technology.

interaction_phrase: in close collaboration with industry
occurrence_sentence: to pioneer the creation of practical applications in close collaboration with industry.

interaction_phrase: support domestic and international vendors
occurrence_sentence: expanding development toward scaling and integration of quantum devices—including qubits and cryogenic control circuits—and enhancing prototype facilities to support domestic and international vendors.

interaction_phrase: among universities and research institutions
occurrence_sentence: Regarding quantum measurement and sensing, solid-state quantum sensors, for example, offer advantages such as high-sensitivity measurement of multiple physical quantities like magnetic fields and temperature in room-temperature environments and within living organisms. Consequently, participation is expanding not only among universities and research institutions but also among companies such as automobile manufacturers.

interaction_phrase: Japan's pioneering work in quantum life sciences is attracting attention from overseas research institutions
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, Japan's pioneering work in quantum life sciences is attracting attention from overseas research institutions.

interaction_phrase: countries like the United States
occurrence_sentence: While this research is currently at the basic research stage and falls within the collaborative domain, it has the potential to evolve into a competitive field with countries like the United States and Germany.

interaction_phrase: overseas stakeholders including universities
occurrence_sentence: The government will take the lead in creating and securing opportunities for global expansion by leveraging frameworks for intergovernmental collaboration, promoting smooth communication with overseas stakeholders including industry, universities, and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: overseas stakeholders including research institutions
occurrence_sentence: The government will take the lead in creating and securing opportunities for global expansion by leveraging frameworks for intergovernmental collaboration, promoting smooth communication with overseas stakeholders including industry, universities, and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: smooth communication with overseas stakeholders including industry, universities, and research institutions
occurrence_sentence: The government will take the lead in creating and securing opportunities for global expansion by leveraging frameworks for intergovernmental collaboration, promoting smooth communication with overseas stakeholders including industry, universities, and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: smooth communication with overseas stakeholders including industry, universities, and research institutions
occurrence_sentence: The government will take the lead in creating and securing opportunities for global expansion by leveraging frameworks for intergovernmental collaboration, promoting smooth communication with overseas stakeholders including industry, universities, and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: must collaborate
occurrence_sentence: Universities, research institutions, and industry must collaborate to enrich opportunities for young people to encounter and learn about quantum technology, from elementary and junior high school through technical colleges and universities.

interaction_phrase: Japanese companies and research institutions
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, it is crucial to strategically advance the development of technologies related to key materials and devices essential for the practical application of quantum technologies, such as quantum computers, which are currently possessed by Japanese companies and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: strengthen the research infrastructure at universities
occurrence_sentence: Given the expected progress and broadening reach of technological development across various fields such as lasers, we will fundamentally strengthen the research infrastructure at universities and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: strengthen the research infrastructure at research institutions
occurrence_sentence: Given the expected progress and broadening reach of technological development across various fields such as lasers, we will fundamentally strengthen the research infrastructure at universities and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: at RIKEN, using a domestically developed actual machine
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, at RIKEN, using a domestically developed actual machine (a superconducting quantum computer) as a test bed, we will develop and advance foundational technologies from software to hardware, as well as system software for quantum-classical hybrid computing environments.

interaction_phrase: AIST will advance the construction of a hybrid quantum-classical computing environment testbed
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, AIST will advance the construction of a hybrid quantum-classical computing environment testbed (including quantum-inspired technologies) aimed at creating industrial use cases.

interaction_phrase: AIST will establish an accessible framework for use, including by overseas institutions
occurrence_sentence: AIST will also establish an accessible framework for use, including by overseas institutions, thereby strengthening its hub function in international collaboration.

interaction_phrase: AIST will increase opportunities for initial verification of technological advantages and business viability through quantum technology
occurrence_sentence: AIST will increase opportunities for initial verification of technological advantages and business viability through quantum technology, with an eye toward building a global supply chain.

interaction_phrase: AIST will establish evaluation testbeds for next-generation materials and electronic devices
occurrence_sentence: To achieve this, AIST will establish evaluation testbeds for next-generation materials and electronic devices, including prototype equipment and cryogenic environments, while enhancing existing facilities.

interaction_phrase: Joint Technical Committee 3 (JTC3) on quantum technologies
occurrence_sentence: The establishment of the Joint Technical Committee 3 (JTC3) on quantum technologies by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) and the International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) reflects the accelerating global momentum toward international standardization of quantum technologies.

interaction_phrase: in collaboration with relevant organizations and institutions such as Q-STAR
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, in collaboration with relevant organizations and institutions such as Q-STAR and AIST, we will establish a domestic deliberative body centered on industry, pursue efforts to secure positions within JTC3 and other bodies, and dispatch experts to participate in standardization activities.

interaction_phrase: in collaboration with relevant organizations and institutions such as AIST
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, in collaboration with relevant organizations and institutions such as Q-STAR and AIST, we will establish a domestic deliberative body centered on industry, pursue efforts to secure positions within JTC3 and other bodies, and dispatch experts to participate in standardization activities.

interaction_phrase: promoted international standardization activities, such as those within the International Telecommunication Union (ITU)
occurrence_sentence: Japan has actively promoted international standardization activities, such as those within the International Telecommunication Union (ITU), which establishes de jure standards for quantum cryptographic communications.

interaction_phrase: international standardization activities within ISO/IEC are accelerating
occurrence_sentence: However, as mentioned earlier, international standardization activities within ISO/IEC are accelerating, necessitating close monitoring of activities across various standardization bodies.

interaction_phrase: primarily by universities and research institutions
occurrence_sentence: Regarding quantum relays, essential for realizing quantum internet, research and development on quantum memory relay technologies using various materials such as diamond, rare-earth ions, and ion traps is being conducted, primarily by universities and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: primarily by universities and research institutions
occurrence_sentence: Regarding quantum relays, essential for realizing quantum internet, research and development on quantum memory relay technologies using various materials such as diamond, rare-earth ions, and ion traps is being conducted, primarily by universities and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: key hubs such as ... AIST will collaborate
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, key hubs such as the Quantum Technology Infrastructure Center (National Institute for Quantum Science and Technology; hereinafter referred to as "QST") and AIST will collaborate to establish a single point of contact for testbed usage.

interaction_phrase: further strengthening collaboration between universities and research institutions
occurrence_sentence: further strengthening collaboration between universities and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: further strengthening collaboration between universities and research institutions
occurrence_sentence: further strengthening collaboration between universities and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: courses and majors focused on quantum technology within universities
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, in cultivating and securing talent to lead the future quantum industry, courses and majors focused on quantum technology within universities play a significant role.

interaction_phrase: establishing programs dedicated to quantum technology
occurrence_sentence: Internationally leading universities abroad are actively establishing programs dedicated to quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: designated as Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs
occurrence_sentence: Based on these considerations, we will focus on universities designated as Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs (   ) to transform graduate education.

interaction_phrase: in cooperation with Q-STAR
occurrence_sentence: With an eye toward creating a quantum industry and cultivating researchers and engineers, the Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs, in cooperation with Q-STAR and others, will explore standard curricula targeting  technical college and university students, as well as opportunities for exchange between students and companies participating in different national projects.

interaction_phrase: outstanding young researchers from Japan
occurrence_sentence: This will attract outstanding young researchers from Japan and abroad and foster excellent talent capable of producing outstanding research results.

interaction_phrase: exchange platforms and symposiums organized by Q-STAR and the Quantum Technology Innovation Hub
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, in addition to continuing existing exchange platforms and symposiums organized by Q-STAR and the Quantum Technology Innovation Hub, we will strengthen workshops, training programs, contests, and other initiatives designed with individual corporate researchers in mind.

interaction_phrase: Japan's quantum technology policies and strategies
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, as mentioned earlier, Japan will provide timely information on quantum technology initiatives in various countries. This aims to support private companies' overseas expansion by disseminating information about Japan's quantum technology policies and strategies to the international community, thereby contributing to industry discussions on competitive and collaborative domains (open and closed domains).

interaction_phrase: based on the "Regulations Concerning the Use of Research Facilities, etc., by Business Operators for New Business Purposes at the National Research and Development Agency National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology,"
occurrence_sentence: AIST, based on the "Regulations Concerning the Use of Research Facilities, etc., by Business Operators for New Business Purposes at the National Research and Development Agency National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology," provides paid rental of some of its research facilities and equipment for use by business operators solely for the purpose of new product development, production, or the development and provision of new services, limited to research and development related to science and technology in the mining and manufacturing industries or the utilization of its research outcomes (as of February 2024).

interaction_phrase: Based on the "National Research and Development Agency National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology Regulations on Side Jobs and Other Activities,"
occurrence_sentence: Based on the "National Research and Development Agency National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology Regulations on Side Jobs and Other Activities," AIST permits its employees to receive annual compensation from side jobs or secondary employment, provided it does not exceed approximately half of the employee's annual income (as of February 2024).

interaction_phrase: designated  as Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs
occurrence_sentence: Eleven universities and research institutions have been designated  as Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs. With RIKEN serving as the headquarters (core hub), each hub has played a role leveraging  its respective strengths.

interaction_phrase: designated  as Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs
occurrence_sentence: Eleven universities and research institutions have been designated  as Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs. With RIKEN serving as the headquarters (core hub), each hub has played a role leveraging  its respective strengths.

interaction_phrase: divided among national  research institutes
occurrence_sentence: Going forward, we will strengthen the collaborative framework among hubs. This includes sharing  common responsibilities such as industrial support, quantum talent development, international  collaboration, and intellectual property management. These tasks will be divided among national  research institutes and universities under the leadership of the headquarters.

interaction_phrase: divided among ... universities
occurrence_sentence: Going forward, we will strengthen the collaborative framework among hubs. This includes sharing  common responsibilities such as industrial support, quantum talent development, international  collaboration, and intellectual property management. These tasks will be divided among national  research institutes and universities under the leadership of the headquarters.

interaction_phrase: strengthen the Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs
occurrence_sentence: In light of the rapid advancement of quantum technology, the formulation of national quantum strategies, international collaboration among interested nations, the utilization status of quantum technology, and changes in the economic security environment, we will strengthen the Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs.

interaction_phrase: bringing together the universities
occurrence_sentence: As the headquarters representing the Quantum Technology Innovation Hub, we will establish a mechanism for continuous human resource development while bringing together the universities and national research institutes designated as hub members.

interaction_phrase: Japan's economic security
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, we will conduct new seed research contributing to Japan's economic security, such as developing quantum sensors usable in extreme environments like space and the ocean.

interaction_phrase: promote participation from universities
occurrence_sentence: We will also build secure research environments and systems to implement these initiatives and promote participation from universities and companies.

interaction_phrase: international standardization activities at bodies such as the ITU
occurrence_sentence: It will continue to advance international standardization activities at bodies such as the ITU and actively contribute to discussions on establishing an international certification system for QKD devices.

interaction_phrase: Japan must take
occurrence_sentence: This strategy, compiled by the Quantum Technology Innovation Council, outlines the additional measures Japan must take to strengthen its position and ensure the creation and development of a quantum industry within the rapidly advancing and intensifying global competition in quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: collaboration with relevant organizations such as quantum technology innovation hubs
occurrence_sentence: This includes cultivating researchers, engineers, managers, evangelists, and personnel capable of overseeing the entire system integration required for the industrialization of quantum technology. This should be done in collaboration with relevant organizations such as quantum technology innovation hubs.

interaction_phrase: collaboration of industry, academia, and government
occurrence_sentence: To achieve the goals set forth in the Quantum Future Society Vision (targeted situation by 2030: 10 million users of quantum technology in Japan, production value generated by quantum technology reaching 50 trillion yen, and creation of quantum unicorn venture companies pioneering future markets), this strategy outlines policies and action plans for the practical application and industrialization of quantum technology under the collaboration of industry, academia, and government.

interaction_phrase: Collaborative research and innovation funding programs
occurrence_sentence: To realize the potential of quantum technology, the following activities are recommended: Collaborative research and innovation funding programs
